what_it_does: This file is a metadata-only channel-memory attachment record that associates attachment id att-e0c7771d with a board item via a board:// URI.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter and no body content
It records an ISO 8601 added timestamp
standouts: The target uses a board:// URI scheme
The file is entirely metadata with no attached payload or explanatory text
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter in a markdown attachment file
Uses an ISO 8601 timestamp with timezone
concerns: No payload or content beyond the link metadata
The semantics of attachment_type 'board_items' are not defined in the file
The referenced board item is not included or described
notes: A bare channel-memory attachment stub that points to a board item but carries no content of its own.
questions: What is the content or nature of board item item-e88fd47f?
Is this attachment meant to hold a payload, or is it intentionally a pure reference?
intention_signals: It appears intended to record that a board item is attached to or referenced from the dragnet-development channel memory.
novelty: The use of a board:// URI as a target reference for a channel attachment.
contribution: Provides a typed, timestamped link between a channel attachment identifier and a board item identifier.
summary_for_embedding: A metadata-only channel-memory attachment record linking attachment att-e0c7771d to board item item-e88fd47f in the dragnet-development channel.
intention_for_embedding: To record that a board item is attached to or referenced by this channel-memory entry.
